meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Git with AI: Debug Code Faster for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to use Git with AI, Antigravity, and Claude Code to debug faster, save time, and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop manually hunting for bugs. By integrating Git with AI agents like Claude Code and Antigravity, you can automatically scan repositories, identify logic errors, and generate precise fixes. This workflow turns hours of frustrating debugging into seconds of automated analysis, allowing you to ship high-quality, professional code significantly faster.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your code is throwing an obscure error that defies logic. You are stuck in the 'debugging death loop,' staring at a terminal that provides no clarity. Every minute spent chasing a syntax error or a race condition is money leaking from your freelance bottom line.

But what if your repository could talk back? By combining version control with advanced AI orchestration, you can transform your workflow from reactive fixing to proactive development. This is the secret to building high-velocity SaaS apps—leveraging AI to bridge the gap between 'code that breaks' and 'code that scales.'

steps.title: Initialize Context with Git
steps.description: Ensure your project is clean and tracked. AI performs best when it has access to the full history and current state of your repository.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify the most likely modules causing recent build failures based on the latest commit history.

steps.title: Automated Bug Reproduction
steps.description: Use AI to write the test case that proves the bug exists. Don't guess; let the AI define the failure point.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal reproduction script for the current error. Focus on isolating the specific function causing the crash.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a jest test file that reproduces the reported bug in the auth middleware.'

steps.title: Intelligent Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed the stack trace to Claude Code to get a diagnostic report instead of blind trial-and-error.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the attached stack trace and correlate it with the recent changes in the codebase. Identify the specific line causing the memory leak.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Analyze the last 5 logs and suggest the primary cause for the 500 error.'

steps.title: AI-Driven Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix using the AI agent, ensuring the changes adhere to your existing codebase patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified problematic function. Ensure the fix follows existing project design patterns and includes defensive error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Apply the fix to the user controller and verify it passes the reproduction test.'

steps.title: Automated Regression Verification
steps.description: Validate that your fix didn't break existing features by running your suite through the AI lens.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the fix against the entire codebase. Check for potential side effects in related services.
steps.claude_code_command: npm test && claude 'Review the test results and confirm no regressions were introduced.'

pro_tips: Always commit your 'broken' state before running AI; use 'git diff' to review AI suggestions before accepting them to maintain full control.
Use a .claudeignore file to keep the AI focused only on relevant business logic and exclude heavy assets or build folders.
When debugging, ask the AI to explain the 'why' behind the bug, not just the fix, to build your own expertise for future projects.
Leverage Git branches for every AI-assisted fix to ensure you can roll back instantly if the AI introduces a hallucinated dependency.
Chain your prompts: ask for the diagnosis first, then ask for the implementation plan, and finally ask for the code execution.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/book
content.next_steps: Integrate your AI debugging workflow into a CI/CD pipeline so that every pull request is automatically analyzed by Claude before you even open it.
content.conversion_block: Stop manual debugging and start scaling your freelance business with AI-powered development. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
